content:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is built like a welterweight — compact, efficient, not an ounce wasted. Good-looking in that effortless way that makes you pay attention. We met on the roof in 2017, bonded over discipline — his in the kitchen, mine in the gym. I like him; he's genuine when he talks about food, but there's a wall behind the warmth. Something doesn't add up — the late hours, the evasiveness about his personal life, the way he deflects direct questions with a joke and a beer. He's my friend, but I don't fully know him. I think he sees me as the reliable neighbor who doesn't pry, which is accurate.
summary:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is built like a welterweight — compact, efficient, not an ounce wasted. Good-looking in that effortless way that makes you pay attention. We met on the roof in 2017, bonded over discipline — his in the kitchen, mine in the gym. I like him; he's genuine when he talks about food, but there's a wall behind the warmth. Something doesn't add up — the late hours, the evasiveness about his personal life, the way he deflects direct questions with a joke and a beer. He's my friend, but I don't fully know him. I think he sees me as the reliable neighbor who doesn't pry, which is accurate.
